prompt: Overlay a red highlight on the masked tumor regions while dimming the unmasked areas.
prompt_refined: Edit image 1 by applying a translucent red highlight overlay specifically on the tumor regions defined by the masks in image 2. Concurrently, dim the brightness of all areas in image 1 that are not encompassed by these masked tumor regions. The output should be a single photorealistic medical image.
objects: axial MRI scan of an abdomen
translucent red highlight overlay on tumor regions
